noop-sum-cart:
def cart_total(items):
    return sum(item.price for item in items)
redact-login-debug:
def login(user, password, correlation_id):
    ok = verify(user, password)
    logger.info('login attempt', actor=user.id, outcome='success' if ok else 'failure', correlation_id=correlation_id)
    return ok
redact-token-issue:
def issue_token(user, correlation_id):
    token = mint_token(user)
    logger.info('token issued', actor=user.id, target={'type':'token','id':token_id(token)}, correlation_id=correlation_id)
    return token
